title: Andrew Fastow
compiled_truth: Andrew Fastow is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-15 to 2001-11-23), Andrew Fastow sent 8 and received 367 emails, totalling 375 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (4), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (3), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (1), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (1), [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (1).
